features: ANTIBACTERIAL HAND WASH: This Imperial Leather Oud and Frankincense hand wash is antibacterial, helping to keep the whole family safe and clean
INDULGING FRAGRANCE: This hand wash is bursting with with Oud and Frankincense - luxury chocolate notes with rose petals gives an extra indulgence
SOAP DISPENSER: This antibacterial hand wash comes in a beautifully designed soap dispenser bottle that will brighten any kitchen or bathroom
SKIN CARE: Imperial Leather hand wash is dermatologically tested and suitable for all skin types - gentle cleaning products made for self care
BULK BUY: These 6 x bottles of antibacterial hand wash is a great bulk buy for the whole family - beauty products you can trust
description: With over 100 years of expertise in hand crafting luxury fragrances, choose Imperial Leather for best in class fragrance bloom and sumptuous lather. Introducing our NEW and improved Imperial Leather Indulgence Oud and Frankincense luxurious handwash with antibactertial properties. Cocoon your hands in our richest, creamiest lather ever, enriched with our signature oil blend for a touch of extravagance and timeless quality. This Imperial Leather Oud and Frankincense hand wash is antibacterial, helping to keep the whole family safe and clean. This antibacterial hand wash comes in a beautifully designed soap dispenser bottle that will brighten any kitchen or bathroom. This Indulging Oud and Frankincense luxurious antibacterial hand wash will add a touch of luxury to any guest bathroom and makes the perfect gift for someone special. These 6 x bottles of antibacterial hand wash is a great bulk buy for the whole family.
